What We Do

Expert
Scaffolding
Solutions

From single-storey renovations to multi-level commercial builds — we deliver safe, engineered scaffolding that keeps your project moving.

01
🏠

Residential Scaffolding

Reliable access solutions for home renovations, extensions, re-roofing, and new builds. Minimal disruption, maximum safety for all residential projects.

02
🏢

Commercial Scaffolding

Large-scale scaffolding for commercial builds, multi-storey developments, and industrial projects. Engineered for performance and compliance.

03
🔧

Renovation & Extensions

Precision scaffold setups for home extensions, façade works, cladding, rendering, and painting access. Tailored to your contractor's requirements.

04
🏗️

New Construction

Full scaffold packages from slab to roof for new home and dual-occupancy builds. Coordinated with builders and trades from day one.

05
🪜

Working Decks & Platforms

Custom working decks, cantilever rigs, and specialty platforms for complex structural access. Engineered to WHS standards.

06
📋

Site Inspections & Quotes

Every project starts with a FREE site inspection. We assess, advise, and provide a detailed quote — no cost, no obligation, no guesswork.

Speaks Volumes

How It Works

Simple
4-Step Process

01
📞

Contact Us

Call Tommy or Stephen, or submit your enquiry online. We'll get back to you same day to discuss your project needs.

→
02
🔍

Free Site Inspection

We visit your site, assess access requirements, and take detailed measurements. All at zero cost to you.

→
03
📄

Detailed Quote

Receive a clear, itemised quote with no hidden costs. We explain exactly what you're getting and when we can mobilise.

→
04
🏗️

We Build & Support

Our crew erects your scaffold safely and on schedule. We stay in contact throughout and dismantle when your job is done.

About UR Scaff

Built on the
Central Coast.
Trusted Across Sydney.

Up Right Scaffolding Pty Ltd is a locally owned and operated scaffolding business serving the Central Coast and Greater Sydney. Founded by Tommy and Stephen, we've built our reputation on showing up, doing the job right, and leaving every site safer than we found it.

From single-storey residentials in Narrabeen to large commercial developments across Sydney — our team brings the same commitment to safety, speed, and quality to every job site.

WHS Compliant
Fully Insured
Licensed Scaffolders
Central Coast Based
Sydney Metro
Free Inspections
Fast Mobilisation
Competitive Rates
